_loomcycle.description: Local filesystem — read-only access to LOOMCYCLE_FILESYSTEM_ROOT. SECURITY: this opens the agent to whatever paths the operator allows.
_loomcycle.agent_prompt_hint: Use this to read project files under the operator-allowed root. Loomcycle's built-in Read tool is usually preferable — it respects caller-supplied narrowing. Use this MCP recipe when you specifically need MCP-shape filesystem access (e.g. from Claude Code via the LoomCycle MCP server).
